title: Freezing Water
description: Freezes the player when entering water above a certain height.
body:
# ❄️ Freezing Water

**Freezing Water** is a simple Minecraft datapack that causes players to freeze when they enter water above a certain height.

![Main](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/neERVxt6/images/b3c5a729b12612079871449c3cb6170b51237412.gif)
## ✨ Features

- Provides visual alerts when freezing.
- You can individually enable or disable the regeneration system for each player.
- You can customize the freezing height with only one command.
- Works in singleplayer and multiplayer.

## 🛠️ Toggle Alerts

You can easily enable or disable each players water freezing at any time using the following commands:

- ✅ **Enable freezing:**  
  `/tag (player) add disable_water_freezing`

- ❌ **Disable freezing:**  
  `/tag (player) remove disable_water_freezing`

You can easily customize height at any time using the following command:
- 🛠️ **Customize height:**  
  `/scoreboard players set .min playery [height]` (Default Value:124)

**Example:** `/scoreboard players set .min playery 124`

## 📦 Installation

1. Download the datapack `.zip` file.
2. Place it in your world's `datapacks` folder.
3. Use `/reload` after joining the world.
4. You're all set! Move around and see your coordinates at the bottom of your screen.

## 🧱 Compatibility

- Minecraft Java Edition 1.13+
- No external resource packs needed
